title: USDA’s NASS and ERS attending National Association of Farm Broadcasting’s 2023 Trade Talk
summary: Representatives from USDA’s National Agricultural Statistics Service (NASS) and Economic Research Service (ERS) will be available for interviews at the annual National Association of Farm Broadcasting (NAFB) Trade Talk at the Westin Crown Center Hotel in Kansas City, Mo., on Thursday, Nov. 16.

title: China and the Arctic: Reflections in 2023
summary: Pavel Devyatkin reflects on China’s role in the Arctic after a work trip to the Ocean University of China in Qingdao. The post China and the Arctic: Reflections in 2023 appeared first on The Arctic Institute - Center for Circumpolar Security Studies .
